titleStmt.title: SII 20.224: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 224. (B.K. No. 28 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This mutilated record is dated Śaka 1217 (in chronogram), Bhādrapada, śu. 5. Monday. It corresponds to A.D. 1295, August 16, the weekday being Tuesday and not Monday.

The inscription seems to belong to the reign of Rāmadēva of the Yādava dynasty. It registers a gift of land for worship and offerings to god Sāntināthadēva, by Sōmaya and Padmaya who purchased the land for the purpose. It refers to an officer who was governing Huligere-300 division. The record mentions certain Jaina preceptors of Mūla-saṁgha, Sūrastha-gaṇa and Chitrakūṭa-anvaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
syādhvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya sā
sti śrī sakakālaśaiḷasasinētrārūpakaṁgūḍi doṁdvisti
vanṟupaṁ śrīrāmarājyōdaya svastaṁbettire manuma
verttisukke bhūmistutyaṁ sujanarkkaḷiṁ purikaraṁ
ntā kuṁttaḷadēsada huligeṟemūnūṟumaṁ duṣṭa nigraha
yadhikāramaṁ māḍutirdda yadhikārigaḷa mahime
maṁtri cāmuṁḍa sakaḷa kṣatrādoroḷācarsarāyarāsthāna
ḷu meṟeva kaḷe jagamitraṁ yadhikapradhāna malidēvā
kārigaḷu rājyaṁ māḍuttire . Ācāryyāvaḷiyaṁteṁ
pūjyapādasvāmigaḷiṁdanaṁtarūyācāryya
cāryyarāgi dharmmōddhāramaṁ māḍidavara mahimeyaṁteṁdo
dahanaṁ siriṇaṁdibratiya siṣya jayakīrttiyatīsparakuvara padma
rnnēmicaṁdrasameyābharaṇaṁ . tatsiṣyarvvijayacaṁda dēvarvvartti
mūlasaṁga sūrasthagaṇa citrakūṭānvayadaśrīmatsavaṇaṁ
ya basthiya caturmmukha caityālayada śrī śāntinātha dēvara pravi
riya malliseṭṭiya basadiya jinnōjana basadiya śrī śāntinātha
ryyaru mādhavacaṁdradēvara magaḷu māyaveya maga pūjākāri
padmayaṁge goggiya basadiya Ācāryaru hēmadēvaruṁ Alli
ya sakaḷakaḷāsāmyavaṁtaruṁ taṁma bhūmiyoḷage krayavāgi koṭṭa mattaru
ḷa maṁ maḷigeya kēriya pāḍayana bāceseṭṭi haripiṭṭiya cavuḍase
ṭṭi gavuḍara nāgiseṭṭi kāṇiya sātiseṭṭi Iṁtivaru mukhyavāda muṁ
muridaṁḍaṁgaḷa samakṣadalli yā sōmeya padmayyaṁgaḷige dhārāpūrbbaka
māgi sarbbābādheparihāramāgi sarbbanamassivāyavāgi koṭṭaru Ā
bhūmiya sīme mūḍalu Aṇnigeṟeya mahāpatha teṁkalu māneya
gēriya bhūmi paḍuvalu goggiya karabhūmi baḍagalu Akkasāli kētana bhū
mi Iṁtā bhūmige catussīme bhādrapada su 5 sōmavāradalu śrī śānti
nāthadēvargge Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōganityapūjānimittamāgi sōmaya
koṁḍa bhūmi . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © maṁgaḷa ma
hā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
